title: Ultra Vanilla
description:
How Vanilla Should be:

This modpack adds 100 different mods made to improve the Vanilla experience and spice up the game.
body:
Ultra Vanilla adds mods that are meant to upgrade the Vanilla player experience. This mod was made for those who wanted to spice things up a little. The mods in this modpack are simple mods that don't change vital game mechanics, but improve them. You can get:
*Optimizations
*Generation
*Better textures
*Combine Chestplate and Elytra (Anvil)
*Much...Much...Much More
I hope that anyone who seeks for this modpack finds this. This is simply all the mods I usually use, in which they can be changed. I will continue to update this modpack as it grows. 

Links:

https://www.canva.com/](https://www.canva.com/
